subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the hem of divine favor! In this court thou art remembered, and in this assembly renowned, the eye of grace watchful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متشبث بذیل عنایت در این محضر مذکوری و در این انجمن مشهور عین عنایت ناظر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for parents, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
